verdict.headline: Belgas Evening — 19:00
verdict.reason: There is a possible evening — 19:00 at Belgas, but the sources are not strong enough for a confident call.

best.explanation: Belgas looks like a small north coast window for Rare window, Medium confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 74 kJ, 10 s period, workable consistency 64/100, and wind is the main risk.  An open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything; this is best for quiet, punchy peaks when Lagide is too small; 10-13s at mid tide also works on Belgas, but low tide is not a deal-breaker, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: wind angle is poor for this spot.

ranked.explanation: Almagreira looks like a small north coast window for Rare window, Medium confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 42 kJ, 13 s period, lully 41/100, and wind is the main risk.  An exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal; this is best for small, clean north-coast days when protected spots look underpowered; 10-13s at mid tide works well on exposed beaches, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: wind angle is poor for this spot.

ranked.explanation: Supertubos looks like a small window for Too soft, Medium confidence: 0-0.3 m, 28 kJ, 10 s period, lully 8/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A fast, hollow sand-bottom wave that gets serious quickly; this is best for short, punchy bodyboard barrels when it is small enough for comfort; 10-13s at mid tide is the prime barrel / wedge setup for Supertubos / Molhe Leste.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small; Supertubos looks below your bodyboard fun size.

ranked.explanation: Lagide looks like a small window for Fun progression, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 47 kJ, 10 s period, lully 44/100, and wind is the main risk.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small; 10-13s at mid tide suits the reef shelves and gives long workable walls.  Watch: spot surf looks too small; wind angle is poor for this spot.
